title: Forged Initials on Shipping Memo
description: A shipping authorization bears the same initials twice — in two distinct hands. Someone falsified access.

title: Rerouted Electrical Crates
description: Three crates of electrical switching equipment were diverted from Machinery Hall to an unlisted service depot under irregular paperwork.

title: Carriage Receipt: Auditorium Hotel
description: A private carriage receipt links Émile Mercier to a late-night meeting at the Auditorium Hotel — not noted in his official schedule.

title: Altered Wiring Diagrams
description: The official schematics for the central lighting demonstration have been subtly altered — a change that would cause a cascade failure on activation.

title: Bribed Night Watchman
description: A freight yard watchman admits to accepting payment for looking away during after-hours deliveries, paid in cash by a well-dressed intermediary.

title: Forged Fair Credential
description: A confiscated badge is legitimate in appearance but bears a false name tied to known freight irregularities.

title: Note: 'Opening Night Lighting'
description: A handwritten note refers to the lighting demonstration as the moment of action — confirming a specific, timed sabotage target.

title: Clara's Inside Source
description: Clara Hale's contact confirms a foreign agent met a Chicago ward man twice in the week before opening — the goal: maximum humiliation, minimum violence.

title: Maintenance Log: Wrong Hand
description: An entry authorizing access to the electrical switchgear is signed by an officer whose actual signature does not match.

title: Overheard French Exchange
description: Near the Midway, a brief exchange in French cuts off at your approach. The words 'la démonstration' and 'demain soir' were unmistakable.
